# Perpo Network

> Perpo is an omnichain orderbook-based trading infrastructure providing perpetual futures liquidity for decentralized exchanges.

API Base: `https://api.perpo.trade/` (Mainnet), `https://testnet-api.perpo.trade` (Testnet). Authentication uses ed25519 signatures. Symbol format: PERP_<TOKEN>_USDC.

## Home

### Home

- [Perpo Home Page](https://perpo.trade/docs/home): Perpo documentation landing page with navigation to integration guides, API references, SDKs, Strategy Vault docs, troubleshooting, and release notes.

## Introduction

### Getting Started

- [What is Perpo?](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/getting-started/what-is-perpo): What Perpo is, who it is for, and how partners build on it.
- [Product Roadmap](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/getting-started/roadmap): Perpo's 2026 H1 product roadmap across growth, trading capabilities, platform upgrades, and vault expansion.
- [How to become a Builder on Perpo Network](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/getting-started/broker-onboarding): A step-by-step guide to onboarding as a builder and setting up your trading platform

### $ORDER Tokenomics

- [Overview of $ORDER](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/tokenomics/overview-of-order): What the $ORDER token is, who uses it, and what it does within the Perpo Network ecosystem.
- [Distribution and Emission Schedule](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/tokenomics/distribution-and-emission-schedule): $ORDER token distribution breakdown and emission schedule across community, team, and ecosystem allocations.

#### $ORDER Staking

- [Staking](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/tokenomics/order-staking/staking): Step-by-step guide to staking $ORDER or esORDER, managing unstaking, vesting, and claiming rewards.
- [Staking Information](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/tokenomics/order-staking/staking-information): How $ORDER staking works — VALOR mechanics, treasury share model, and advantages for long-term stakers.

- [esORDER](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/tokenomics/esorder): How esORDER (escrowed ORDER) works, including staking benefits and vesting redemption schedules.
- [$ORDER Related Smart Contract Addresses](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/tokenomics/addresses): Smart contract addresses for the $ORDER token across Ethereum, Arbitrum, and other supported chains.

### Trade on Perpo

- [Trade on Perpo](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/trade-on-perpo): An overview of trading on Perpo Network — shared liquidity, omnichain access, and multiple ways to trade.
- [Perpo Orderbook Design](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/trading-basics/orderbook-design): How Perpo's central limit order book combines CEX-level performance with on-chain settlement.

#### Trading Basics

- [Glossary](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/trading-basics/glossary): Definitions of key trading terms used across Perpo, from order book and spread to funding rate and ADL.
- [Perpetual Futures Trading](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/trading-basics/perpetual-futures): Introduction to perpetual futures trading, explaining leverage, long/short mechanics, and settlement in USDC.
- [Accounts](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/trading-basics/accounts): Account structure
- [Order Types](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/trading-basics/order-types): Supported order types on Perpo including Market, IOC, FOK, Limit, and Post Only with execution rules.
- [Trading fees](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/trading-basics/trading-fees): Understanding the fee structure for Traders and the Builder Staking programme

#### Perpetual Futures Basics

- [Formulas and Definitions](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/formulas-definitions): Formulas for margin, collateral, free collateral, PnL, and liquidation price calculations on Perpo.
- [Margin, Leverage & PnL](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/margin-leverage-and-pnl): Explanation of notional value, margin ratio, leverage tiers, and unrealized PnL on Perpo.
- [Isolated Margin](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/isolated-margin): How Isolated Margin mode works on Perpo, including per-position margin allocation, independent leverage, and risk isolation.
- [Mark Price, Index Price, and Last Price](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/mark-price-index-price-and-last-price): How Perpo computes Mark Price, Index Price, and Last Price with manipulation safeguards.
- [Order Price Limit](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/orders-price-limits): Price range limits enforced on futures orders to prevent manipulation and protect against extreme moves.
- [Funding Rate](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/funding-rate): How funding rates are calculated and settled between long and short traders on Perpo perpetual futures.
- [Liquidations](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/liquidations): How Perpo triggers and processes liquidations when account margin falls below the maintenance threshold.
- [Insurance Fund & ADL](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/perpetual-futures/insurance-fund-and-adl): The Perpo Insurance Fund functions as a safeguard to protect bankrupt traders from being insolvent.

- [Supported Markets](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/supported-markets): Full list of perpetual futures markets available on Perpo, with token symbols and contract identifiers.
- [Supported Chains](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/supported-chains): A list of supported chains
- [Multi-Collateral](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/multi-collateral): Supported collateral types, per-chain deposit caps, discount rates, and cross-chain collateral rules.
- [Builders](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/trade-on-perpo/builders): Shape the future of DeFi with Perpo.

### DEX's Affiliate Program

- [Perpo DEX’s Affiliate Program (Affiliate’s Quick Guide)](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/be-a-broker/perpo-dex-affiliate-program-affiliates-quick-guide): Quick guide for affiliates using Perpo DEX’s Affiliate Program.
- [Perpo DEX’s Affiliate Program (Builder’s Quick Guide)](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/be-a-broker/perpo-dex-affiliate-program-brokers-quick-guide): Quick guide for builders enabling and managing Perpo DEX’s Affiliate Program.
- [Affiliate & Referral Program (Legacy)](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/be-a-broker/affiliate-referral-program): Legacy documentation for the Perpo referral ecosystem for Builders, Affiliates, and Traders.

### Perpo OmniVault

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/perpo-omniVault/overview): Overview of Perpo OmniVault, an omnichain strategy vault for earning yield through market-maker strategies.
- [Mechanics](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/perpo-omniVault/mechanics): How OmniVault shares, deposits, withdrawals, and strategy-provider PnL distribution work.
- [Liquidity Provider](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/perpo-omniVault/liquidity-provider): How to deposit into and withdraw from Perpo OmniVault as a liquidity provider.
- [FAQ](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/perpo-omniVault/faq): Frequently asked questions about Perpo OmniVault, covering fees, risks, deposits, and withdrawals.

### Perpo One

- [Builder Guidelines](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/perpo-one/builder-guidelines): Code of conduct and branding standards for DEX builders on the Perpo One infrastructure.
- [Supplemental Terms for DEXes](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/perpo-one/supplemental-terms-for-dexes): Supplemental legal terms for developers building and operating front-end DEXes on Perpo infrastructure.
- [Perpo Distributor Program](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/perpo-one/vanguard-distributor-program): Tiered revenue-sharing program that incentivizes distributors to onboard new builders into Perpo One.

### Learn More

- [FAQ](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/faqs): Frequently asked questions about Perpo Network, covering how it works, supported chains, fees, and key concepts.
- [Delisting Standards](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/delisting-standards): Criteria and metrics Perpo uses to evaluate and delist underperforming perpetual futures markets.
- [Security](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/security): Audit history, governance model, and security measures that protect the Perpo protocol.
- [Terms of Service](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/terms-of-service): Legal terms governing the use of Perpo Network services, including user obligations and restrictions.
- [Privacy Policy](https://perpo.trade/docs/introduction/privacy-policy): Perpo Network privacy policy detailing how user data is collected, used, and shared.

## Build on Omnichain

### Getting Started

- [Building on Perpo](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/building-on-omnichain): Start building your dApp on Perpo's omnichain trading infrastructure.
- [Smart Contract Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/overview): Visual overview of Perpo smart contract interactions for deposits, withdrawals, trades, and PnL settlement.
- [Smart Contract Addresses](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/addresses): Smart contract addresses for Perpo vault, USDC, and Verifier on each supported chain (mainnet and testnet).
- [Integration Checklist](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/integration-checklist): A structured guide for builders integrating with Perpo Network.

### Partner Onboarding & Support

- [Partner Support](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/partner-support): Technical support and resources for builders integrating with Perpo Network.
- [Affiliate Onboarding Guide](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/affiliate-onboarding): Setup requirements for new affiliates including subdomain configuration, TradingView licensing, and branding.
- [Integration FAQs](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/integration-faqs): Frequently asked questions for builders integrating with Perpo Network.

### Implementation Flows

- [Accounts](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/accounts): Overview of account structure
- [Wallet Authentication](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/wallet-authentication): Overview of wallet authentication & Perpo keys
- [Deposit/Withdrawal](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/withdrawal-deposit): Overview of deposit and withdrawal flow
- [Settle PnL](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/settle-pnl): How to settle realized and unrealized PnL into USDC balance via the Perpo API.
- [Order Management](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/order-management): How orders flow through Perpo's architecture, from placement to execution and settlement.
- [Isolated Margin](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/isolated-margin): Step-by-step guide to integrating Isolated Margin: switching margin modes, setting leverage, placing orders, and adjusting position margin.
- [Custom Fee Structure](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/custom-fees): How builders configure custom maker/taker fee structures for their users on top of Perpo base fees.
- [Delegate Signer](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/delegate-signer): How smart contracts trade on Perpo using the delegate signer pattern to bypass EOA-only signing.
- [Algo Order Sample Requests](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/algo-order-samples): Sample API request payloads for creating STOP, TP/SL, Positional TP/SL, and Bracket algo orders.
- [Internal Transfer](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flows/internal-transfer): Overview of internal transfer flow
- [User Flow Walkthrough](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/user-flow-walkthrough): End-to-end walkthrough of Perpo account creation, key management, ordering, and settlement via the API.

### API Fundamentals

- [Introduction](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/introduction): Perpo API overview covering REST and WebSocket endpoints, authentication, and request conventions.
- [API Authentication](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/api-authentication): All requests need to be signed using `perpo-key` and `perpo-secret`.
- [Error Codes](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/error-codes): Complete list of Perpo API error codes with HTTP status codes and descriptions.

### General API

#### Builder Info

- [Get Builder Volume](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-builder-volume): Get Builder Volume
- [Get Builder List](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-builder-list): Get Builder List
- [Get Builder Stats](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-builder-stats): Get Builder Stats
- [Get Supported Chains Per Builder](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-supported-chains-per-builder): Get Supported Chains per Builder
- [Get Market Volume By Builder](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-market-volume-by-builder): Get Market Volume by Builder
- [Get Tvl By Builder](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-tvl-by-builder): Get TVL by Builder

#### System Info

- [Get System Maintenance Status](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-system-maintenance-status): Get System Maintenance Status
- [Get Vault Balance](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-vault-balance): Get Vault Balance
- [Get Insurance Fund Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-insurance-fund-info): Get Insurance Fund Info
- [Get Announcements](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-announcements): Get Announcements
- [Get Ip Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-ip-info): Get IP Info

#### USDC Faucet

- [Get Faucet Usdctestnet Only](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-faucet-usdctestnet-only): Get Faucet USDC(Testnet Only)

#### Registration

- [Check If Account Exists](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/check-if-account-exists): Check if Account Exists

- [Check If Address Is Registered](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/check-if-address-is-registered): Check if Address is Registered
- [Get Registration Nonce](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-registration-nonce): Get Registration Nonce
- [Register Account](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/register-account): Register Account

#### Key Management

- [Get Perpo Key](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-perpo-key): Get Perpo Key
- [Add Perpo Key](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/add-perpo-key): Add Perpo Key
- [Remove Perpo Key](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/remove-perpo-key): Remove Perpo Key
- [Get Current Perpo Key Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-current-perpo-key-info): Get Current Perpo Key Info
- [Get Perpo Key Ip Restriction](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-perpo-key-ip-restriction): Get Perpo Key IP Restriction
- [Set Perpo Key Ip Restriction](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/set-perpo-key-ip-restriction): Set Perpo Key IP Restriction
- [Reset Perpo Key Ip Restriction](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/reset-perpo-key-ip-restriction): Reset Perpo Key IP Restriction

#### Account/User Info

- [Get User Daily Volume](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-user-daily-volume): Get User Daily Volume
- [Get User Volume Statistics](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-user-volume-statistics): Get User Volume Statistics
- [Get User Statistics](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-user-statistics): Get User Statistics
- [Get Account Overview Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-account-overview-info): Get Account Overview Info
- [Get Account Information](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-account-information): Get Account Information
- [Get User Daily Statistics](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-user-daily-statistics): Get User Daily Statistics

#### Account Notifications

- [Get All Notifications](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-all-notifications): Get All Notifications
- [Get Unread Notifications](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-unread-notifications): Get Unread Notifications

- [Set Read Status Of All Notifications](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/set-read-status-of-all-notifications): Set Read Status of All Notifications

#### Account Config

- [Get Leverage Setting](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-leverage-setting): Get Leverage Setting
- [Get All Leverage Settings](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-all-leverage-settings): Get All Leverage Settings
- [Update Leverage Setting](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/update-leverage-setting): Update Leverage Setting
- [Get Margin Modes](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-margin-modes): Get Margin Modes
- [Update Margin Mode](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/update-margin-mode): Update Margin Mode
- [Add Reduce Position Margin](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/add-reduce-position-margin): Add or Reduce Position Margin
- [Get Max Leverage Setting](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-max-leverage-setting): Get Max Leverage Setting
- [Get Leverage Configuration](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-leverage-configuration): Get Leverage Configuration
- [Configure Auto Cancel During Maintenance](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/configure-auto-cancel-during-maintenance): Configure Auto-Cancel During Maintenance

### Trading API

#### Order Management

- [Create Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/create-order): Create Order
- [Batch Create Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/batch-create-order): Batch Create Order
- [Create Algo Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/create-algo-order): Create Algo Order
- [Edit Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/edit-order): Edit Order
- [Edit Algo Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/edit-algo-order): Edit Algo Order
- [Cancel Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/cancel-order): Cancel Order
- [Cancel Algo Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/cancel-algo-order): Cancel Algo Order
- [Cancel Order By Client Order Id](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/cancel-order-by-client_order_id): Cancel Order By client_order_id
- [Cancel Algo Order By Client Order Id](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/cancel-algo-order-by-client_order_id): Cancel Algo Order By client_order_id
- [Cancel All Pending Algo Orders](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/cancel-all-pending-algo-orders): Cancel All Pending Algo Orders
- [Cancel All Pending Orders](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/cancel-all-pending-orders): Cancel All Pending Orders
- [Cancel All After](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/cancel-all-after): Cancel All After
- [Batch Cancel Orders](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/batch-cancel-orders): Batch Cancel Orders
- [Batch Cancel Orders By Client Order Id](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/batch-cancel-orders-by-client_order_id): Batch Cancel Orders By client_order_id
- [Get Order By Order Id](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-order-by-order_id): Get Order by order_id
- [Get Order By Client Order Id](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-order-by-client_order_id): Get Order by client_order_id
- [Get Algo Order By Order Id](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-algo-order-by-order_id): Get Algo Order by order_id
- [Get Algo Order By Client Order Id](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-algo-order-by-client_order_id): Get Algo Order by client_order_id
- [Get Orders](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-orders): Get Orders
- [Get Algo Orders](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-algo-orders): Get Algo Orders
- [Get Trades](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-trades): Get Trades
- [Get Trade](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-trade): Get Trade
- [Get All Trades Of Specific Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-all-trades-of-specific-order): Get All Trades of Specific Order
- [Get All Trades Of Specific Algo Order](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-all-trades-of-specific-algo-order): Get All Trades of Specific Algo Order

#### Liquidations

- [Get Positions Under Liquidation](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-positions-under-liquidation): Get Positions Under Liquidation
- [Get Liquidated Positions Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-liquidated-positions-info): Get Liquidated Positions Info
- [Get Liquidated Positions By Liquidator](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-liquidated-positions-by-liquidator): Get Liquidated Positions by Liquidator
- [Get Liquidated Positions Of Account](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-liquidated-positions-of-account): Get Liquidated Positions of Account
- [Claim Liquidated Positions](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/claim-liquidated-positions): Claim Liquidated Positions
- [Claim Insurance Fund](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/claim-insurance-fund): Claim Insurance Fund

#### Assets/Withdraw/Settle PnL

- [Get Asset History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-asset-history): Get Asset History
- [Get Current Holding](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-current-holding): Get Current Holding
- [Get Withdrawal Nonce](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-withdrawal-nonce): Get Withdrawal Nonce
- [Create Withdraw Request](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/create-withdraw-request): Create Withdraw Request
- [Get Settle Pnl Nonce](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-settle-pnl-nonce): Get Settle PnL Nonce
- [Request Pnl Settlement](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/request-pnl-settlement): Request PnL Settlement
- [Get Pnl Settlement History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-pnl-settlement-history): Get PnL Settlement History
- [Create Internal Transfer](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/create-internal-transfer): Create Internal Transfer
- [Create Internal Transfer With Wallet Signature](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/create-internal-transfer-with-wallet-signature): Create Internal Transfer With Wallet Signature
- [Get Transfer Nonce](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-transfer-nonce): Get Transfer Nonce
- [Get Internal Transfer History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-internal-transfer-history): Get Internal Transfer History

#### Positions

- [Get All Positions Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-all-positions-info): Get All Positions Info
- [Get Lite Positions Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-lite-positions-info): Get Lite Positions Info
- [Get One Position Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-one-position-info): Get One Position Info
- [Get Position History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-position-history): Get Position History

#### Funding

- [Get Funding Fee History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-funding-fee-history): Get Funding Fee History


### Strategy Vault API

#### Account

- [Get Strategy Vault Nonce For Account Transaction](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-strategy-vault-nonce-for-account-transaction): Get Strategy Vault Nonce for Account Transaction
- [Create Strategy Vault Depositwithdrawal Request With Account](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/create-strategy-vault-depositwithdrawal-request-with-account): Create Strategy Vault Deposit/Withdrawal Request with Account
- [Get Account’S Strategy Vault Transaction History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-account’s-strategy-vault-transaction-history): Get Account’s Strategy Vault Transaction history


### Staking & Valor API

#### Staking

- [Get Wallets Current Staked Balance](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-wallets-current-staked-balance): Get Wallet's Current Staked Balance
- [Get Unstaking Order Details](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-unstaking-order-details): Get Unstaking ORDER Details
- [Get Staking Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-staking-overview): Get Staking Overview
- [Get Esorder Vesting List](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-esorder-vesting-list): Get esORDER vesting list

#### Valor

- [Get Valor Batch Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-valor-batch-info): Get Valor Batch Info
- [Get Valor Pool Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-valor-pool-info): Get Valor Pool Info
- [Get Valor Redeem Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-valor-redeem-info): Get Valor Redeem Info
- [Get Valor2 Pool Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-valor2-pool-info): Get Valor2 Pool Info
- [Get Valor2 Batch Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-valor2-batch-info): Get Valor2 Batch Info
- [Get Valor2 Redeem Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-valor2-redeem-info): Get Valor2 Redeem Info
- [Get Valor2 Revenue Buyback](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-valor2-revenue-buyback): Get Valor2 Revenue Buyback

- [Check Referral Code](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/check-referral-code): Check Referral Code

- [Verify Referral Code](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/verify-referral-code): Verify Referral Code
- [Get Referral Code Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-referral-code-info): Get Referral Code Info
- [Update Referral Code](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/update-referral-code): Update Referral Code
- [Bind Referral Code](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/bind-referral-code): Bind Referral Code
- [Get Referral Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-referral-info): Get Referral Info
- [Get Referee Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-referee-info): Get Referee Info
- [Get Referee Rebate Summary](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-referee-rebate-summary): Get Referee Rebate Summary
- [Get Referee History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-referee-history): Get Referee History
- [Get Referral History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-referral-history): Get Referral History
- [Get Referral Rebate Summary](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-referral-rebate-summary): Get Referral Rebate Summary
- [Get Distribution History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-distribution-history): Get Distribution History
- [Edit Referral Code Split](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/edit-referral-code-split): Edit Referral Code Split

- [Builder Admin Get Auto Referral Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/builder-admin-get-auto-referral-info): Builder admin get auto referral info

- [Get Stage Rankings](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-stage-rankings): Get Stage Rankings

### Market Data API

#### TradingView

- [Get Tradingview Localized Config Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-tradingview-localized-config-info): Get TradingView Localized Config Info
- [Get Tradingview History Bars](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-tradingview-history-bars): Get TradingView History Bars
- [Get Tradingview Symbol Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-tradingview-symbol-info): Get TradingView Symbol Info

#### Funding Rates

- [Get Funding Rate History For One Market](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-funding-rate-history-for-one-market): Get Funding Rate History for One Market
- [Get Predicted Funding Rate For One Market](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-predicted-funding-rate-for-one-market): Get Predicted Funding Rate for One Market
- [Get Predicted Funding Rates For All Markets](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-predicted-funding-rates-for-all-markets): Get Predicted Funding Rates for All Markets
- [Get Funding Rate For All Markets](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-funding-rate-for-all-markets): Get Funding Rate for All Markets

#### Market Info

- [Get Supported Collateral Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-supported-collateral-info): Get Supported Collateral Info
- [Get Order Rules Per Symbol](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-order-rules-per-symbol): Get Order Rules per Symbol
- [Get Available Symbols](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-available-symbols): Get Available Symbols
- [Get Market Trades](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-market-trades): Get Market Trades
- [Get Price Info For All Symbols](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-price-info-for-all-symbols): Get Price Info for All Symbols
- [Get Open Interests For All Symbols](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-open-interests-for-all-symbols): Get Open Interests for All Symbols
- [Get Market Info For All Symbols](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-market-info-for-all-symbols): Get Market Info for All Symbols
- [Get Market Info For One Symbol](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-market-info-for-one-symbol): Get Market Info for One Symbol
- [Get Index Price Source](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-index-price-source): Get Index Price Source
- [Get Historical Price List For All Symbols](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-historical-price-list-for-all-symbols): Get Historical Price List for All Symbols
- [Orderbook Snapshot](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/orderbook-snapshot): Orderbook Snapshot
- [Get Kline](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/private/get-kline): Get Kline
- [Get Kline History](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/restful-api/public/get-kline-history): Get Kline History


### Websocket API

- [Websocket API](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/introduction): WebSocket API base endpoints, available public and private topics, and subscription/unsubscription format.
- [PING/PONG](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/ping-pong): WebSocket keep-alive mechanism using ping/pong messages with a 10-second interval.
- [Authentication](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/authentication): How to authenticate WebSocket private stream connections using perpo-key and perpo-secret.
- [Error Response](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/error-response): Format and example of WebSocket error responses, including the client ID mapping pattern.

#### Public Market Data

- [Request orderbook](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/request-orderbook): Request a one-time orderbook snapshot for a symbol via WebSocket instead of subscribing to updates.
- [Orderbook](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/orderbook): Subscribe to full depth-100 orderbook snapshots for a symbol via WebSocket, pushed every second.
- [Order book update](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/order-book-update): Subscribe to incremental orderbook updates for a symbol via WebSocket, pushed every 200ms.
- [Trade](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/trade): Subscribe to real-time trade execution events for a symbol via WebSocket.
- [24h ticker](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/24-hour-ticker): Subscribe to 24-hour ticker data for a single symbol via WebSocket, pushed every second.
- [24h tickers](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/24-hour-tickers): Subscribe to 24-hour ticker data for all symbols via WebSocket, pushed every second.
- [24h ticker by builder](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/24-hour-ticker-by-builder): Subscribe to 24-hour ticker data for a single symbol filtered by builder ID via WebSocket.
- [24h tickers by builder](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/24-hour-tickers-by-builder): Subscribe to 24-hour ticker data for all symbols filtered by builder ID via WebSocket.
- [bbo](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/bbo): Subscribe to best bid and offer (BBO) updates for a single symbol via WebSocket, pushed every 10ms.
- [bbos](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/bbos): Subscribe to best bid and offer (BBO) updates for all symbols via WebSocket, pushed every second.
- [k-line](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/k-line): Subscribe to OHLC kline/candlestick updates for a symbol at configurable time intervals via WebSocket.
- [Market Price Changes Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/price-changes): Subscribe to market price change information for all symbols via WebSocket, pushed every minute.
- [Traders Open Interest](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/traders-open-interests): Subscribe to aggregated traders' open interest data via WebSocket, pushed every minute.
- [Price for Small Charts](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/price-for-small-charts): Subscribe to historical price data for small chart rendering via WebSocket, pushed every minute.
- [Index price](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/index-price): Subscribe to index price updates for a single symbol via WebSocket using the SPOT symbol format.
- [Index prices](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/index-prices): Subscribe to index price updates for all symbols via WebSocket, pushed every second.
- [Mark price](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/mark-price): Subscribe to mark price updates for a single symbol via WebSocket, pushed every second.
- [Mark prices](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/mark-prices): Subscribe to mark price updates for all symbols via WebSocket, pushed every second.
- [Open interest](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/open-interest): Subscribe to open interest updates for a symbol via WebSocket, with 1s change and 10s forced push.
- [Estimated funding rate](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/estimated-funding-rate): Subscribe to estimated funding rate updates for a symbol via WebSocket, pushed every 15 seconds.
- [Liquidation push](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/liquidation-push): Subscribe to real-time liquidation event notifications via WebSocket.
- [System maintenance status](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/system-maintenance-status): Subscribe to real-time system maintenance status notifications via WebSocket.
- [Announcement](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/public/announcement): Subscribe to real-time system announcements via WebSocket.

#### Private User Data

- [Account](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/account): Subscribe to real-time account status updates via private WebSocket stream.
- [Balance](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/balance): Subscribe to real-time token balance updates via private WebSocket stream.
- [Execution Report](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/execution-report): Subscribe to order execution reports, optionally filtered by symbol, via private WebSocket stream.
- [Algo Execution Report](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/algo-execution-report): Subscribe to algo order execution reports via private WebSocket stream.
- [Algo Execution Report v2](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/algo-execution-report-v2): Subscribe to v2 algo order execution reports with enhanced fields via private WebSocket stream.
- [Notifications](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/notifications): Subscribe to real-time account notifications via private WebSocket stream.
- [Position push](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/position-push): Subscribe to real-time position updates via private WebSocket stream.
- [Liquidation on account push](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/liquidation-account-push): Subscribe to account-level liquidation event notifications via private WebSocket stream.
- [Liquidator liquidations push](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/liquidator): Subscribe to liquidator-initiated liquidation updates via private WebSocket stream.
- [PnL Settlement](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/pnl-settlement): Subscribe to PnL settlement status updates via private WebSocket stream.
- [Wallet Transactions](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/wallet-transactions): Subscribe to deposit and withdrawal transaction updates via private WebSocket stream.
- [Asset Convert](https://perpo.trade/docs/build-on-omnichain/websocket-api/private/asset-convert): Subscribe to asset conversion status updates via private WebSocket stream.


## SDKs

### Software Development Kits

- [List of SDKs](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/overview): Comparison of Perpo SDKs (React components, hooks, core, perp) to help choose the right starting point.
- [Release Notes](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/release-notes): Links to the full Perpo TypeScript SDK release notes and related setup documentation.
- [Migrate to SDK v2](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/migrate): Migration guide from Perpo SDK v1 to v2, covering breaking changes, new hooks, and Solana support.

### [EVM] React Components SDK

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/overview): Overview of Perpo Components SDK
- [Getting started](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/getting_started): Step-by-step guide to install the Perpo React SDK, configure providers, and build trading pages.
- [Theming](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/theming): How to customize the Perpo SDK visual theme including colors, typography, and component overrides.
- [Wallet connect](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/wallet): How to integrate wallet connection with the Perpo React SDK using WalletConnectorContext.

#### Framework Guides

- [Next.js](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/next): How to set up the Perpo SDK in a Next.js project with App Router or Page Router.

#### Page Components

- [TradingPage](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/components/trading): Full-featured TradingPage component with orderbook, chart, order form, positions, and responsive layout.

#### Block Components

- [Deposit](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/components/deposit): Pre-built React component for token deposits with wallet connection handling and modal support.
- [Withdraw](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/components/withdraw): Pre-built React component for token withdrawals with wallet connection handling and modal support.
- [Order Book](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/components/order_book): Pre-built React OrderBook component with depth merging, price display, and height adaptation.
- [Portfolio](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/components/portfolio): Pre-built React portfolio components including history, settings, and mobile-responsive pages.
- [Scaffold](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/react/components/scaffold): Layout scaffold component with navigation, sidebar, footer, and responsive desktop/mobile support.


### [EVM] React Hooks SDK

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/overview): Overview of [Perpo Hooks SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@perpo.trade/hooks)
- [Setup](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/setup): How to install, configure, and connect wallet adapters with the Perpo React hooks SDK.

#### API Requests

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/api): Overview of low-level API hooks for making custom REST and WebSocket requests to Perpo.
- [useQuery](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/use-query): Hook to fetch data from public API endpoints with automatic JSON serialization.
- [usePrivateQuery](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/use-private-query): Hook to fetch data from authenticated private API endpoints.
- [usePrivateInfiniteQuery](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/use-private-infinite-query): Hook for paginated private API queries with infinite scroll support.
- [useLazyQuery](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/use-lazy-query): Hook for on-demand fetching of public API data, triggered manually rather than on mount.
- [useMutation](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/use-mutation): Hook for POST, PUT, and DELETE API requests such as creating or cancelling orders.
- [useWS](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/use-ws): Hook to subscribe to public WebSocket topics with custom message handlers.
- [useWsStatus](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/api/use-ws-status): Hook to monitor the current WebSocket connection status.

#### Utility

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/util/util): Overview of utility hooks for config, events, local storage, session storage, and media queries.
- [useConfig](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/util/use-config): Hook to read Perpo configuration values like brokerId, networkId, and API URLs.
- [useEventEmitter](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/util/use-event-emitter): Hook for cross-component event communication using an emit/on pattern.
- [useLocalStorage](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/util/use-local-storage): Hook to read and write values in browser localStorage with React state binding.
- [useSessionStorage](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/util/use-session-storage): Hook to read and write values in browser sessionStorage with React state binding.
- [useMediaQuery](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/util/use-media-query): Hook to evaluate a CSS media query and return a boolean for responsive layouts.

#### Account

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/account): Overview of account-related hooks for registration, key management, leverage, and wallet events.
- [useAccount](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-account): Hook for creating an Perpo account, generating Perpo keys, and managing the KeyStore.
- [useAccountInfo](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-account-info): Hook to fetch basic account information like fee rates, leverage, and account mode from the API.
- [useAccountInstance](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-account-instance): Hook to access the Account singleton for registration, Perpo key creation, and wallet details.
- [useWalletConnector](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-wallet-connector): Hook to connect, disconnect, and switch chains for a user's wallet.
- [useWalletSubscription](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-wallet-subscription): Hook to subscribe to on-chain wallet events like deposit and withdrawal completions.
- [useLeverage](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-leverage): Hook to get and update the account's maximum leverage setting.
- [useMarginRatio](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-margin-ratio): Hook to get the current margin ratio, leverage, and maintenance margin ratio for an account.
- [useSettleSubscription](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-settle-subscription): Hook to subscribe to PnL settlement status events via WebSocket for the current account.
- [useDaily](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/account/use-daily): Hook to retrieve daily trading volume for the current account over a date range.

#### Assets

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/assets): Overview of hooks for collateral, deposits, withdrawals, balances, and chain information.
- [useCollateral](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/use-collateral): Hook to get collateral details including total value, free collateral, and unsettled PnL.
- [useMaxQty](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/use-max-qty): Hook to get the maximum tradeable quantity for a symbol and order side.
- [useChain](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/use-chain): Hook to get chain information for a specific token.
- [useChains](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/use-chains): Hook to retrieve the list of chains supported by Perpo with a chain-ID lookup helper.
- [useDeposit](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/use-deposit): Hook for managing token deposits, including wallet balance lookup and deposit execution.
- [useWithdraw](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/use-withdraw): Hook for managing withdrawals with available balance, max withdrawable amount, and unsettled PnL.
- [useHoldingStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/assets/use-holding-stream): Hook to receive real-time token holding balances via WebSocket.

#### Market Data

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/markets): Overview of market data hooks for orderbook, prices, trades, tickers, and symbol information.
- [useOrderbookStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-orderbook-stream): Hook to stream formatted orderbook data with depth control and auto symbol switching.
- [useIndexPrice](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-index-price): Hook to receive real-time index price updates for a symbol via WebSocket.
- [useMarkPrice](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-mark-price): Hook to receive real-time mark price updates for a symbol via WebSocket.
- [useMarkPricesStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-mark-prices-stream): Hook to stream mark prices for all symbols as a symbol-to-price map.
- [useMarketTradeStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-market-trade-stream): Hook to stream recent trade executions for a given symbol via WebSocket.
- [useMarkets](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-markets): Hook extending useMarketsStream with favorites, recent views, and history tracking.
- [useMarketsStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-markets-stream): Hook to stream 24h ticker data for all markets via WebSocket.
- [useTickerStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-ticker-stream): Hook to stream market information (mark price, index price, 24h stats) for a single symbol.
- [useSymbolsInfo](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-symbols-info): Hook to subscribe to symbol configuration data for all tradeable instruments.
- [useSymbolPriceRange](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/market-data/use-symbol-price-range): Hook to get the allowed price range for an order based on symbol, side, and trigger price.

#### Orders

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/orders/orders): Overview of hooks for order placement, streaming, editing, and cancellation.
- [useOrderEntry](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/orders/use-order-entry): Hook for building order forms with validation, max quantity, estimated liquidation price, and submission.
- [useOrderStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/orders/use-order-stream): Hook to stream, filter, edit, and cancel orders by status, symbol, or side.
- [useTPSL](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/orders/use-tp-sl): Hook for creating and managing take-profit and stop-loss (TP/SL) algo orders on positions.

#### Positions

- [usePositionStream](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/positions/use-position-stream): Hook to stream position data with calculated values for margin, liquidation price, and unrealized PnL.
- [usePoster](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/positions/use-poster): Hook to generate shareable poster images from position information with customizable styling.

#### Funding

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/funding/funding): Overview of funding-related hooks available in the Perpo hooks SDK.
- [useFundingRate](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/funding/use-funding-rate): Hook to receive the current funding rate for a given perpetual futures symbol.

#### Referral

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/referral): Overview of hooks for referral code management, referee tracking, and rebate summaries.
- [useCheckReferralCode](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-check-referral-code): Hook to verify whether a given referral code exists.
- [useGetReferralCode](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-get-referral-code): Hook to obtain a referral code by account ID.
- [useDaily](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-daily): Hook to retrieve daily perpetual volume data for referral tracking over a date range.
- [useRefereeInfo](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-referee-info): Hook to retrieve paginated referee information with date filtering.
- [useRefereeHistory](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-referee-history): Hook to retrieve paginated referee history with date filtering.
- [useRefereeRebateSummary](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-referee-rebate-summary): Hook to get daily referee rebate statistics over a date range.
- [useReferralInfo](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-referral-info): Hook to get referral profile info including affiliate/trader status and first referral code.
- [useReferralRebateSummary](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/hooks/referral/use-referral-rebate-summary): Hook to get daily referral rebate statistics over a date range.


### [EVM] Core SDK

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/core/overview): Overview of [Perpo Core SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@perpo.trade/core)

### [EVM] Perp SDK

- [Overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/sdks/perp/overview): Overview of [Perpo Perp SDK](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@perpo.trade/perp)

## Strategy Vault

### Strategy Vault

#### Vault Details

- [Vault Info](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-info): Get Strategy Vault Info

#### Vault Statistics

- [Vault Overall Statistics](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-overall-statistics): Get Overall Statistics of all Strategy Vaults
- [User Overall Statistics](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/user-overall-statistics): Get User Overall Statistics across Strategy Vaults
- [Vault Performance](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-performance): Get Strategy Vault Performance
- [Vault Performance Chart](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-performance-chart): Get Strategy Vault TVL/PnL History

#### Order Management

- [Vault Positions](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-positions): Get Strategy Vault Positions
- [Vault Open Orders](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-open-orders): Get Strategy Vault Open Orders
- [Vault Trade History](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-trade-history): Get Strategy Vault Trade History
- [Vault Liquidator History](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/vault-liquidator-history): Get Strategy Vault Liquidator History

- [Supplemental Terms for Community Strategy Vault](https://perpo.trade/docs/strategy-vault/vault/public/supplemental-terms): These Supplemental Terms apply to your use of the Community Strategy Vaults, a self-custody smart contract interface provided by Perpo. These Supplemental Terms form part of the Perpo Network Ltd. General Terms of Service (the “Terms”), and are Suppleme...

## Troubleshooting

### Introduction

- [Introduction overview](https://perpo.trade/docs/troubleshooting/introduction): Starting point for diagnosing integration, account, transaction, and trading issues on Perpo.

### User Issues

- [Transaction/order issues](https://perpo.trade/docs/troubleshooting/user-issues/transaction-failures): How to triage failed transactions and orders by separating on-chain from API-level failures.
- [Stuck/delayed withdrawals](https://perpo.trade/docs/troubleshooting/user-issues/withdrawal-issues): How to diagnose delayed or stuck withdrawals by checking LayerZero messaging and chain status.
- [Stuck/delayed deposits](https://perpo.trade/docs/troubleshooting/user-issues/deposit-issues): How to diagnose and resolve delayed or stuck deposits using the Dune dashboard and support channels.
- [Liquidation issues](https://perpo.trade/docs/troubleshooting/user-issues/liquidation-issues): How to investigate unexpected liquidations by reviewing margin requirements and market volatility.
- [Orders/position not closing at expected prices](https://perpo.trade/docs/troubleshooting/user-issues/wrong-execution-price): How to investigate orders that did not execute at the expected price due to slippage or order type.

## Release Notes

### Updates by area

- [Omnichain](https://perpo.trade/docs/release-notes/omnichain): Release notes for the Omnichain platform
- [TS SDK](https://perpo.trade/docs/release-notes/sdk): Release notes for the TypeScript SDK

### Classification

- [Release Classification](https://perpo.trade/docs/release-notes/classification): Classification of releases
